completion_promises.criterion_text: src/fleet_memory/reindex/publisher.py exposes a publisher that accepts a BasePayload and publishes a MemoryEpisodeV1 onto the MEMORY stream
completion_promises.evidence: Verified: publish_episode() function exists in publisher.py (lines 39-79), accepts BasePayload parameter, publishes to MEMORY stream via broker.publish(episode_data, subject='MEMORY'). Implementation uses module-level broker singleton from app.py per nats-asyncio-service pattern.

completion_promises.criterion_text: The published episode has content_format == 'json' and payload_type == payload.payload_type, so RelayService._ingest_json routes it to the DeterministicWriter rather than the prose chunker
completion_promises.evidence: Verified: Episode construction sets content_format='json' (line 72) and payload_type=payload.payload_type (line 74). Test test_episode_is_json_with_payload_type confirms episode.content_format == 'json' and payload_type routing. Test passes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: body is the payload's canonical JSON serialization and round-trips: get_model_for_type(episode.payload_type)(**json.loads(episode.body)) reconstructs an equal payload
completion_promises.evidence: Verified: Body serialization uses json.dumps(payload.model_dump(mode='json'), sort_keys=True, separators=(',', ':')) for canonical JSON with stable ordering. Test test_body_round_trips_through_registry verifies get_model_for_type(episode.payload_type)(**json.loads(episode.body)) == original_payload. Test passes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: source_ref carries the source document reference; episode_id is derived deterministically from the payload natural_key (so a re-publish of the same parsed document is idempotent at the JetStream Msg-Id layer as well as downstream)
completion_promises.evidence: Verified: episode_id = _derive_episode_id(payload.natural_key) uses SHA-256 hash (lines 23-36). source_ref = payload.source_ref (line 75). Test test_episode_id_deterministic_for_natural_key verifies same natural_key yields same episode_id. Test test_source_ref_preserved verifies source_ref passes through. Tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: No language-model, cloud, or frontier-model request is made by the publisher (asserted by test — e.g. no network egress / no LLM client constructed)
completion_promises.evidence: Verified: Publisher uses only stdlib (hashlib, json) and broker.publish. No LLM client imports. Test test_no_network_calls_during_publish mocks broker and verifies completion without network activity. Test passes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: tests/unit/reindex/test_publisher.py asserts content_format, payload_type, body round-trip, and deterministic episode_id
completion_promises.evidence: Verified: Test suite contains 5 tests covering all requirements: test_episode_is_json_with_payload_type (routing contract), test_body_round_trips_through_registry (serialization round-trip), test_episode_id_deterministic_for_natural_key (idempotent publish), test_no_network_calls_during_publish (no LLM calls), test_source_ref_preserved (provenance). All 5/5 tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Verified: Files pass Black and Ruff checks (confirmed in Turn 1 verification). Code follows PEP 8, uses type hints, docstrings, and 88-char line limit per project code-style.md.
